title: Marksman 12 Self Adhesive Hanging Hooks - Bathroom/Kitchen
features: No tools required: Hang the hooks wherever you want without the need for tools.
Don't worry about damage: Once is removed, there is no residue adhesive left.
Reusable: You can change the position of the hook as many times you want.
Sticks on everything: Works on painted surfaces, glass, laminate, stainless steel, tiles and more.
Hang everything: Hang towels, keys and even jackets.
